event_name: Gamepasses departure - SCP Games and SCP Monsters
description: Hi, I have made the decision that starting October 2027, I will disable or prevent the purchases of Gamepasses, this decision had to be made because I cannot guarantee that these Gamepasses will still work in the future, because I see that some items inside these Gamepasses have started to no longer work as expected because some of the systems or codes inside these Gamepasses items are starting to... maybe... you could say they are starting to get "old"? or "outdated"? although some still seem to work perfectly, and... I'm sorry💚. Some notes: (October 2027 is still estimated, it could be sooner or later) (Please, no questions, I can't answer that, I'm sorry) (What about those who already have the Gamepass? or what about those who are planning to buy it later? Don't worry, you will still have it, it's just that the Gamepasses purchases will be disabled in October 2027 and yeah, you'll still have it after that😁) (This is a quick decision, I don't recommend considering this final yet)

All of the Drying content from previous years will return, including over 120 limited cosmetics, event locations, vehicles, the Tankgewehr, Trooper LMG, and sandstorms! This year’s Drying will also include: - Updates to the Oasis, Crawler, and multiple minor locations. - New limited weapon skin pack. - A couple of new limited cosmetics. When the Drying event begins, the following additions and changes will also come with the update: - The Loot Rebalance overhaul will be implemented, which includes more Northward player spawns and more diverse high-tier loot for every location across the entire map. - New firearm, the “L85A1 Assault Rifle”. - New Utility item, the “Covert Militia Radio Receiver”. - Adjusted map positions for some random events, infected, vehicles, and unmarked locations for balance. - Further implementation of optimized structures to reduce memory overhead. - Reduction in the amount of worthless loot containers and excess furniture assets to reduce memory overhead.
- Sorcerer Killer Abilities - New Pets - New questline - New Gadgets
- Tempest King Ability - New Survival Map - New Cosmetics - New Bundle
